name: Fruit Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the ripe papaya and remove any seeds.
2. Dice a firm small banana.
3. Mince the green onions.
4. Chop 3 tablespoons of fresh cilantro.
5. Juice 3 tablespoons of lime.
6. Mince 2 jalapeno peppers.
7. Combine all chopped ingredients in a bowl.
8. Mix well with lime juice and cilantro.
9. Serve at room temperature.
